# Work Item Details Creation Process

## Phase 1: Deep Codebase Investigation
Search the codebase exhaustively for all issues in the audit checklist.

## Phase 2: Findings Enumeration
Present findings as a numbered list with root cause and fix.

## Phase 3: Work Item Description Composition
Compose: Goal, Why, What changes, How it works, Files affected, Task List.

## Phase 4: Task List Creation
Embed task list with format+commit after each implementation task.
Final verification: just test, just diagnose, just fmt, final commit.
Include CRITICAL REMINDERS footer and Task Loading Instructions.

## Phase 5: Write to File
Write to work_items/ directory.
